toolSetupPrompts.reason: This flow requires a 'graph' tool selection before execution.

options.description: Full graph-backed codebase, feature, and knowledge surfaces. Pair with graph-ops usage workflows for mature orchestration.
Low-setup fallback that treats graph evidence as advisory. Pair with graph-ops usage workflows for mature orchestration.
Multi-database property graph option with native vector indexes. Suitable when you want one graph platform for codegraph plus feature/knowledge/skill surfaces.
High-performance graph option with native vector search and multi-tenant graph capability. Suitable for hybrid graph plus vector retrieval with operational caveats.
Project-supplied graph backend that must pass adapter checks and should ship with a matching usage pack.
